About Me

Analytically driven and creatively minded, with a passion for marketing, product development, and the entertainment industry.

Who I Am

I am Garron Seddon, a Business Analytics and Information Systems major at the University of South Florida, with a minor in Marketing. I graduate in May 2026 with a 3.5 GPA and hands-on experience applying data and strategy to real business challenges.

My interests lie at the intersection of analytics, marketing, and creative industries. Whether it is understanding consumer behavior, building data-driven marketing strategies, or developing products that connect with audiences, I am drawn to work that blends analytical thinking with creativity.

My experience spans product management at ConnectWise, systems, analytics, and IT at Heritage Insurance, and digital marketing at Angels Havinn. Each role has deepened my ability to translate data into decisions and ideas into execution.

Outside of work, I enjoy food reviews, movies, music, and studying history and culture — interests that fuel my curiosity and connect directly to my passion for the entertainment industry.

I also served as Head of Recruitment for Delta Sigma Pi at USF, where I led campaigns that grew membership applications by 15% and brought 200+ prospective members through the door.
